title: Password reset email missing
ticket: I have tried resetting my password three times and no email arrives. I am locked out before a customer demo in an hour.

title: Duplicate card charge
ticket: Our company card was charged twice for the June subscription. I can see two pending charges but only one invoice.

title: Production webhook failures
ticket: Every production webhook has returned HTTP 500 since this morning. Sandbox deliveries still work.

title: Dashboard is intermittently slow
ticket: The analytics dashboard takes about 25 seconds to load a few times each afternoon, but eventually opens.

title: Account owner change
ticket: Our previous administrator left the company. Please make me the account owner instead.

title: Rotated API key rejected
ticket: Requests started returning invalid_api_key immediately after we rotated the production credential.

title: Incorrect VAT on invoice
ticket: The latest invoice applies VAT even though our exemption certificate was approved last month.

title: SSO setup guidance
ticket: We are planning SSO next quarter. Where can I find setup requirements for our identity provider?

title: Large export timeout
ticket: A CSV export of our full-year events times out after ten minutes. Small monthly exports succeed.

title: Slack integration disconnected
ticket: Slack notifications stopped yesterday and the integration page says disconnected. The rest of the app works.

title: Wrong email on account
ticket: I signed up with a typo in my work email and cannot receive the verification message.

title: Card declined during renewal
ticket: Our renewal payment was declined and access is now restricted. The bank says the card is active.

title: Webhook SDK example request
ticket: Do you have a webhook verification example for a Python Flask endpoint?

title: Intermittent mobile login
ticket: Several users can log in on desktop but get a blank screen after login on mobile. It started this week and is intermittent.

title: Vague issue report
ticket: It does not work. Please fix it.
